entry.title: hello
entry.content: Hello world! This is my first blog and I do not kown how to write it yet. <u>I feel sorry about it. But today is a meaningful date.</u> If you are reading this blog, I feel it an honor. Once-in-a-million. This is just miracle. #include <stdio.h> void main () 1{ 1printf("hello world!"); 1} Wish we can company you from today on! ^from today on ​
